name: CZ75自动型 | 幻光构架
descriptionEn: A fully automatic variant of the CZ75, the CZ75-Auto is the ideal short-term choice for turning the tables and gaining your opponents weapon. But with very little ammo in the magazine, strong trigger discipline is required. A grey and tan optical illusion hydrographic pattern has been applied. Did you get a good look?
descriptionZh: 一把全自动的 CZ75 手枪变种，在扭转局势以及获取敌人武器时，CZ75 自动手枪是一个短期的理想选择。但弹夹中的弹药极少，你需要节约每一发子弹。 这把武器绘有灰色和棕褐色的光学幻觉图案。 你看清楚了吗？
